multi_step: The solver must interpret the depicted chemical structure, discard non-structural arrow markings, and map the result to one of 5 SMILES choices.
This is more than simple OCR or lookup, but it is still a single-select multiple-choice task rather than a long chained derivation.
No explicit numeric calculation or extended multi-condition reasoning is stated in the text.
verifiability: The answer is a short text string that exactly matches one of the provided options, making final-answer checking straightforward.
There are 5 explicit choices, so correctness can be verified by exact string/option match.
